overall.description: A first-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic penthouse apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Night City. The camera moves through sleek interior corridors into a main living area with an infinity pool, then pans across the panoramic cityscape at dusk before focusing on interior details including a modern sofa and holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment corridor with glass railings and digital art

agents.ego_description: walking through a sleek, dimly lit corridor with glass railings and abstract digital art on the walls

entered.detail: sleek transparent glass railing with metal trim running along the corridor edge
large wall-mounted display showing abstract blue and red digital artwork
angled floor-to-ceiling window revealing cityscape and palm trees outside
tall palm trees visible through the window against the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, modern corridor of a luxury apartment. The camera moves forward past a digital art screen displaying abstract blue and red patterns, with glass railings on the right and panoramic windows on the left revealing palm trees and the city outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living area with infinity pool and panoramic views

events.description: exits narrow corridor into expansive main living area with infinity pool and floor-to-ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: entering the main living space and approaching the infinity pool while taking in the panoramic city views

entered.detail: rectangular infinity pool with dark water reflecting the ceiling lights
futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and neon lights against a cloudy dusk sky
suspended holographic display unit with glowing blue interface elements

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into a vast living area dominated by an infinity pool and massive panoramic windows. The Night City skyline becomes fully visible through the windows, with a floating holographic TV suspended in the center of the room. The space transitions from enclosed corridor to open-concept luxury living.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic terrace overlooking Night City with palm trees

agents.ego_description: panning across the panoramic windows to observe the cityscape, palm trees, and neon signage

entered.detail: glowing cyan neon sign with 'satays' text on a distant building
glass and metal railing along the edge of the terrace overlooking the city
white modular sofa with fur throw positioned facing the city view

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right across the panoramic view, bringing palm trees into the foreground and revealing a glowing 'satays' neon sign in the distance. A modern white sofa becomes visible on the right, positioned to face the cityscape. The terrace railing and outdoor area come into view as the camera continues its sweep.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room interior with furniture and holographic displays

events.description: turns from the city view back toward the interior living space

agents.ego_description: examining the interior living space including a modern sofa, acoustic guitar, and scattered items on the floor

entered.detail: wooden acoustic guitar lying on the carpeted floor near the sofa
loose papers and items scattered across the dark carpet
small round glass table in front of the sofa

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the city view to focus on the interior living space, revealing a modern white sofa with a fur throw, an acoustic guitar on the floor, and scattered papers. The floating holographic TV displays glowing cyan graphics, and the room is lit by recessed ceiling lights. The city skyline remains visible in the background through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, modern corridor into a vast, open-concept luxury living area overlooking a futuristic cityscape. It begins by gliding past a digital art screen with abstract patterns, flanked by glass railings and windows that offer glimpses of palm trees. As the camera emerges from the narrow hallway, the space expands into a grand room featuring an infinity pool and a floating holographic TV, fully revealing the sprawling Night City skyline. The view then pans right across the panoramic windows to highlight a glowing neon sign in the distance and the edge of an outdoor terrace before turning back toward the interior. Finally, the focus shifts to the intimate details of the living space, settling on a white sofa with a fur throw and an acoustic guitar on the floor while the city remains a glowing backdrop.
